creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
I've updated klavaro to v0.8.1

I also tried to update to v0.9.0 which is latest version. It compiles fine, but it totally doesn't work.
When you run klavaro v0.9.0 it displays many GTK errors about missing signal handlers. It's weird.

Anyway v0.8.1 works find :)

Note: If maintainer doesn't want to keep maintaining this port, I could take over.
